message:
style: reformat test assertions and method chains for rustfmt compliance

Apply consistent formatting across 2 Browser Edition test files to
align with rustfmt conventions:

asupersync-browser-core/tests/abi_exports.rs:
- Reformat websocket_close() call to single-line argument list with
  chained .expect() on a new indented line

tests/wasm_package_build_contract.rs:
- Break long array literals in for-loop iterators into multi-line
  format (build, build:wasm, build:packages, clean, typecheck, validate)
- Collapse short assert_eq!/assert! macros onto single lines where
  they fit within the column limit
- Reformat .join() path chains and read_to_string() unwrap chains
  for consistent indentation
- Simplify multi-line tuple construction in version collection iterator

No functional changes — purely formatting adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
